历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17587 → 20040 → 26504 → 30582 → 38786, showing a continuous and significant backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 38786, which is about 8204 places behind 2024, and the cumulative backward movement over the past 3 years is about 18746 places, with the rate accelerating. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Physics Category was 58 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 65 in 2024, and 84 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 96, an increase of 12 students (+14.3%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of significant expansion, exerting notable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 53rd, with recent rankings fluctuating between 46 and 58, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to the positive event of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 89th). There have been no significant admission gaps in recent years. Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-. Among the majors enrolled in Physics Category, basic disciplines such as Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology have a high correlation with education.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Computer Science was rated 'Recommended' in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication as 'Highly Recommended', Electrical Engineering as 'Highly Recommended', and engineering majors related to Physics Category are relatively popular. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, with a slight expansion in the examinee pool.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 2–3%, making it an out-of-province enrollment. The willingness of Guangdong examinees to apply for out-of-province 211 normal universities is influenced by regional preferences, with no significant changes in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend in historical rankings, the slight increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 (+3.6%), the downward pressure from the significant expansion of enrollment plan (+14.3%), and the attraction of high popularity in engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 38786, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 42191, with a range of 41691–42691.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 41691–42691, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 41691), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 42691), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 46 and 58 in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to the positive event of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate from Central China Normal University; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 89th), with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no significant enrollment gaps in recent years. Education A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with Education being the university's flagship, strongly attracting teacher-training candidates.
